nasb.text: For to this end Christ died and lived again, that He might be Lord both of the dead and of the living.

esv.text: For to this end Christ died and lived again, that he might be Lord both of the dead and of the living.

cnv.text: 為了這緣故，基督死了，又活過來，就是要作死人和活人的主。

ccb.text: 正是为这个缘故，基督死了，又复活了，好做死人和活人的主。

csbs.text: 正是为此，基督死了，而且复活了，要做死人和活人的主。
